title: Article Generator: Multi-Agent System
description: Multi-agent pipeline built with Agno that automates the full article lifecycle — a research agent gathers topic context and sources, a writing agent drafts structured long-form content, and an editing agent refines tone, clarity, and formatting for a developer audience.

title: Deep Research Agentic AI System
description: Agentic system built with LangChain and served via FastAPI, leveraging MCP (Model Context Protocol) for standardised tool integration. Iteratively decomposes complex queries, retrieves and synthesises information across multiple sources, and produces structured research reports with organised findings and source attribution.

title: Financial Analyst Agent
description: AI agent system for financial analysis built with LangChain and served via FastAPI. Processes financial statements, earnings reports, and market data through LLM reasoning to surface key metrics, generate structured analysis summaries, and answer domain-specific financial queries. Built at the intersection of agentic AI architecture and strong finance domain knowledge.

title: Data Science Team: Multi-Agent System
description: Team-oriented multi-agent AI system built with Agno, coordinating specialised agents across distinct data science pipeline stages including data analysis, insight generation, and structured reporting. Designed around collaborative agent patterns where each agent owns a dedicated function within the shared workflow.

title: Agno: Unsplash Tool (Open Source)
description: Contributed a native Unsplash image-retrieval tool to the Agno agentic framework, enabling agents to query and return images programmatically via the Unsplash API. PR reviewed and merged to main by Agno maintainers — live for the full community.
